title: 200pcs Embellishments for Crafting, 13mm Flower Gems for Crafting, Clothes, Hats, Shoes, Bags, Craft Gems with Metal Base for DIY Crafts Jewelry Making Clothing Accessories, Mixed Color
features: 【Unique Design】Jewels for crafting adopt hexagonal flower design, with a big rhinestone in the middle and a circle of small rhinestones around it, which is particularly dazzling under the light, Can be used as exquisite decorations to make your project more elegant and charming

【Easy to Use】The back of embellishments for crafting is flat, and you can use glue to fix it on fabrics and other accessories, which is easy to operate. The sparkling rhinestones for hats are fashionable and beautiful, suitable for you to make exquisite crafts

【Wide Application】Craft embellishments can be used for collars, trouser pockets, dresses, wedding dresses, evening gowns, hairpins, hats, socks, shoes, bags, etc. You can also DIY beautiful jewelry with these rhinestones, such as bracelets and earrings, making your outfit more personalized and letting you look more attractive

【High-quality Materials】Flower gems are made of high-quality shiny glass rhinestones and equipped with a metal base to firmly fix the rhinestones; the rhinestones are about 13 mm (0.51 inches) in diameter and 5 mm (0.19 inches) thick. Under the sunshine and light, these flat back gems for crafting will emit a charming glitter and shining like a diamond

【Rhinestones for Clothes Set】You will receive 200pcs flower shaped rhinestones for craft, rich colors and sufficient quantity can inspire your creativity and meet your diverse handmade needs for clothing, jewelry and DIY decoration
